title: Kyros Serves King Riku
description: Pages 1–5 focus on kyros serves king riku, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a bizarre finish!! The 20-odd stalwart fighters who re- mained...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: ...were all mysteriously knocked out in a flash!!! D-block sure has been a doozy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But in the center of the ring...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: At this very moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone is attempting to stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Will this be our winner!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is this the one respond- Bible for it all!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Re...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It was Rebecca who stood up!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The promising candidates of D-Blocks, said to be potential winners...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All those infamous Warriors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: None have been able to stand...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So the final contestant moving on to the next round in this, dress- Rosa's fighting tournament...!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...is, of all people, the one carries the sullied blood of the Riku Royal Family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The prisoner Gladia- for...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: RebecC call!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fuck you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What'd you do, re- Becca!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I demand an investi- gallon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Prisoner Gladiator Lodgeings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Rebecca did it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I don't know what happened, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Anyway, she won!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: What a terrible outcome!! What'd you do to cavern- dish-sama!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There's no way commodore orlumbus could lose to that little girl!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Someone who thinks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Kama- Itachi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: "The kama- Itachi of Rommel".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Long ago, in the normal kingdom during the night, a wind would blow that cut people to shreds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: These mysterysteri- OUS incidents kept occur- ring....!! So a marine battle- ship was dis- patched.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Those Marines also fell victim to that "wind," but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: In the end, the true identity of that cutting wind was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: A single man who went by the name "Hakuba".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: to this very day, we haven't caught him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: And he always appears in towns where a certain pirate happens to be visiting.

summary: Kyros Serves King Riku focuses on Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.
